lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad har naam vakhaanai |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he chants the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: anadin naam rataa din raatee maaeaa mohu chukaahaa he |8|
lines.english: Night and day, he remains imbued with the Naam, day and night; he is rid of emotional attachment to Maya. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਸੋਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: aape kripaa kare sukhadaataa gur kai sabade sohaa he |9|
lines.english: The Lord, the Giver of peace Himself grants His Grace; He exalts and adorns with the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te sabh kichh paae |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, all things are obtained;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa aap gavaae |
lines.english: egotism, possessiveness and self-conceit are taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਹੈ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad amrit hai baanee |
lines.english: The Guru's Shabad is the Ambrosial Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਚਾ ਵਸੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੋ ਘਟੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: har har sachaa vasai ghatt antar so ghatt niramal taahaa he |10|
lines.english: That heart becomes immaculate, which is filled with the True Lord, Har, Har. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: anadin har kaa naam vakhaanee |
lines.english: Night and day, chant the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa rang raate har gun gaaveh |
lines.english: Imbued forever with the color of His Love, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਲਾਹਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sevak seveh sabad salaaheh |
lines.english: His servants serve, and praise His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਅਕਥੁ ਕਥੇ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabade akath kathe saalaahe |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, they speak the Unspoken, and praise the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਪਰਮਲ ਵਾਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase sabad milaae paramal vaas man taahaa he |11|
lines.english: He Himself forgives, and unites them with the Shabad; the fragrance of sandalwood permeates their minds. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਸਬਦੈ ਕਾ ਰਸੁ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: aape gunadaataa sabad milaae sabadai kaa ras taahaa he |12|
lines.english: The Giver of virtue Himself unites them with the Shabad; they enjoy the sublime essence of the Shabad. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਭੂਲਾ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bhoolaa tthaur na paae |
lines.english: The confused, self-willed manmukhs find no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਾਚੇ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: mere prabh saache veparavaahe |
lines.english: My True Lord God is self-sufficient.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur likhiaa su karam kamaae |
lines.english: They do those deeds which they are pre-destined to do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਰਾਤੇ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਖੋਜੈ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa raate bikhiaa khojai mar janamai dukh taahaa he |13|
lines.english: Imbued with poison, they search out poison, and suffer the pains of death and rebirth. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap aap saalaahe |
lines.english: He Himself praises Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪਿ ਸਚਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਚੀ ਆਪੇ ਅਲਖੁ ਅਥਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: too aap sachaa teree baanee sachee aape alakh athaahaa he |14|
lines.english: You Yourself are True, and True is the Word of Your Bani. You Yourself are invisible and unknowable. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਗੁਣ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਮਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: tere gun prabh tujh hee maahe |
lines.english: Your Glorious Virtues are within You alone, God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਕੋਟੀ ਜੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: lakh kottee je karam kamaae |
lines.english: though one may make hundreds of thousands and millions of attempts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਬਦੇ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te ghatt antar vasiaa sabade sach saalaahaa he |15|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, He dwells deep within the heart; through the Shabad, praise the True Lord. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਦਾਤੇ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur daate koe na paae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, the Giver, no one finds the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਮਿਲੇ ਧੁਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: se jan mile dhur aap milaae |
lines.english: They alone meet Him, whom the Lord unites with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saachee baanee sabad suhaae |
lines.english: They are adorned and exalted with the True Word of His Bani, and the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਨਿਤ ਸਾਚੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੪॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak jan gun gaavai nit saache gun gaavah gunee samaahaa he |16|4|13|
lines.english: Servant Nanak continually sings the Glorious Praises of the True Lord; singing His Glories, he is immersed in the Glorious Lord of Virtue. ||16||4||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਏਕੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal ek sadaa sach soee |
lines.english: The One Lord is eternal and unchanging, forever True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur te sojhee hoee |
lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, this understanding is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਭੀਨੇ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਇਨਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸੀਲੁ ਸੰਨਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har ras bheene sadaa dhiaaein guramat seel sanaahaa he |1|
lines.english: Those who are drenched with the sublime essence of the Lord, meditate forever on Him; following the Guru's Teachings, they obtain the armor of humility. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਛੋਡਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nau nidh naam vasiaa ghatt antar chhoddiaa maaeaa kaa laahaa he |2|
lines.english: The Naam, the embodiment of the nine treasures, abides within their hearts; they renounce the profit of Maya. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਚਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: andar rang sadaa sachiaaraa |
lines.english: Deep within, they love the True Lord forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad har naam piaaraa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they love the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਈਅਤਿ ਰਾਜੇ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਦੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: reeat raaje duramat doee |
lines.english: Both the king and his subjects are involved in evil-mindedness and duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਏਕੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve ek na hoee |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, they do not become one with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਧਿਆਇਨਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਰਾਜੁ ਤਿਨਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ek dhiaaein sadaa sukh paaein nihachal raaj tinaahaa he |3|
lines.english: Those who meditate on the One Lord find eternal peace. Their power is eternal and unfailing. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣਾ ਰਖੈ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa rakhai na koee |
lines.english: No one can save them from coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਤੇ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maran tisai te hoee |
lines.english: Birth and death come from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਗਤਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਤਿਸੈ ਤੇ ਪਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh saachaa sadaa dhiaavahu gat mukat tisai te paahaa he |4|
lines.english: The Gurmukh meditates forever on the True Lord. Emancipation and liberation are obtained from Him. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai krodh sabad nivaarai |
lines.english: Egotism and anger are silenced through the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸੀਲੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sadaa sukh paaeeai seel santokh sabh taahaa he |5|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, lasting peace is found; humility and contentment all come from Him. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਦੁਆਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach sanjam satiguroo duaarai |
lines.english: Truth and self-control are found through the Door of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਚਾ ਜਗਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve naam na paaeeai naam sachaa jag laahaa he |6|
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, the Naam is not obtained. The Naam is the True profit in this world. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag binasai naam visaaraa |
lines.english: Forgetting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, all the world perishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੋਹੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mohu upajai sansaaraa |
lines.english: Out of egotism and attachment, the Universe welled up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਅਮਰੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa amar sabad suhaaeaa |
lines.english: True is His Will, beauteous and pleasing through the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਸਬਦ ਮਿਲਿ ਵਾਜਾ ਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: panch sabad mil vaajaa vaaeaa |
lines.english: The Panch Shabad, the five primal sounds, vibrate and resonate.
